name: WFGY_triage_llm_rag_failure
description: Generate a structured prompt bundle (system + user message) to triage LLM/RAG failures using the WFGY ProblemMap (No.1..No.16). Returns prompts, a minimal-fix checklist, and links to the public ProblemMap. No LLM or external API call is made.

bug_description.description: Free-text description of the LLM/RAG incident. Include the user prompt, retrieved context, model answer, and any relevant logs.

audience.description: Target audience for the prompt bundle tone. 'beginner' uses plain language, 'engineer' is concise and diagnostic, 'infra' is ops-focused.

return_schema.description: Structured prompt bundle for LLM/RAG triage.

mode.description: Always 'prompt_bundle_only' — no LLM call is made by this tool.

system_prompt.description: System message to pass to an LLM for WFGY ProblemMap triage.

user_prompt.description: User message template with the incident report embedded.

how_to_use.description: Step-by-step instructions for using the prompt bundle with any LLM.

checklist.description: Minimal list of items to include in the bug report for effective triage.

links.description: Plain-text URLs to the public WFGY ProblemMap and repository.

examples.description: Representative LLM/RAG failure patterns to illustrate WFGY ProblemMap usage.

test_examples.bug_description: RAG chatbot answers with facts not present in retrieved context. Retrieved chunks talk about credit cards only, but model claims Bitcoin is supported.
